tags.name: cosmoz-tabs
tags.description: DOM-driven tabbed-views container. Renders the tab bar from its <cosmoz-tab> children and switches the active panel.

properties.name: hash-param
properties.description: URL hash parameter to bind the selection to

properties.name: no-resize
properties.description: Suppress the window resize event dispatched on selection

properties.name: compact-width
properties.description: Tabs spread to fill the width by default; add the compact-width attribute to size them to their content

slots.description: The `cosmoz-tab` elements; the selected one's content is shown

slots.name: tabs
slots.description: Extra content at the start of the tab bar

slots.name: stats
slots.description: Extra content at the end of the tab bar

properties.name: heading
properties.description: The tab label shown in the tab bar

properties.name: badge
properties.description: Optional badge text shown next to the heading

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A lit-html icon template (e.g. from @neovici/cosmoz-icons); set as a property

events.name: tab-first-select
events.description: Fired once, the first time this tab is ever activated

events.name: tab-select
events.description: Fired each time this tab becomes active

tags.name: cosmoz-tabs-next
tags.description: Data-driven tablist container. Pairs with <cosmoz-tab-next> and the useTabs/renderTabs/renderActivated hook API.

properties.name: variant
properties.description: Untitled UI tab style: 'brand' (default) or 'underline'; reflected onto children as variant

properties.name: compact-width
properties.description: Tabs spread to fill the width by default; add the compact-width attribute to size them to their content (reflected onto children as compact-width)

tags.name: cosmoz-tab-next
tags.description: A single clickable tab header within <cosmoz-tabs-next>. It does not hold panel content — the consumer renders panels (e.g. via renderActivated).

slots.name: icon
slots.description: A leading icon (e.g. an SVG from @neovici/cosmoz-icons)

tags.name: cosmoz-tab-card
tags.description: A collapsible card, typically placed inside a <cosmoz-tab>. Styled via @neovici/cosmoz-tokens; the --cosmoz-tab-card-* custom properties override the token defaults.

properties.name: heading
properties.description: Card title; when absent the header is not rendered

properties.name: collapsable
properties.description: Allow the card to collapse on header click

slots.name: card-actions
slots.description: Actions on the right of the header

cssProperties.name: --cosmoz-tab-card-collapse-icon-order
cssProperties.description: Flex order of the collapse icon
